analysis: The project appears to be a website focused on black holes, with existing files for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The theme should incorporate dark, cosmic visuals with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The current CSS file is incomplete and needs to be updated to reflect the black hole theme. The HTML and JavaScript files also need to be completed to ensure all sections are properly included and interactive elements are functional.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements as described in the intent.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
